suite.name: FDE Turn Quality + Hook Enforcement Eval Suite

testCases.title: FDE turn stores hashes and sanitized summaries instead of raw prompt text
testCases.expectedBehavior: PromptFrontDoor envelopes and FDE turn records do not persist raw user prompt text by default; turn records carry userMessageHash plus sanitized leadSummary.

testCases.title: FDE sidecar and lead cards preserve non-mutating invariants
testCases.expectedBehavior: The sidecar references the processed session, lead cards reference the sidecar, and every card keeps mutationAuthorizedFromCard=false.

testCases.title: FDE turn exposes readiness and eval observability
testCases.expectedBehavior: The readiness profile exposes evaluation requirement evidence, score, missingRequired, and a grade verdict without requiring public handler registration.

testCases.title: Internal FDE turn/readiness handlers stay out of public MCP tools
testCases.expectedBehavior: fde-ontology-turn and grade-fde-readiness remain internal/non-public handler files and are not listed in public TOOLS or public HANDLER_MODULES.
